

################################################################################ 

# 

# OUTLINES:

# Use GENOVA to generate Aggregate TAD Analysis (ATA) plots to quantify the enrichment of chromatin contacts around TAD boundaries and assess domain insulation.

# 

################################################################################ 

```{r}

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(GENOVA))
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(rtracklayer))

F_CON_C57 <- load_contacts(
signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/matrix/F1_F_CON/iced/40000/F1_F_CON_G1_40000_iced.matrix',
indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/matrix/F1_F_CON/raw/40000/F1_F_CON_G1_40000_abs.bed',
sample_name = "F_CON_C57"
)

F_CON_PWK <- load_contacts(
signal_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/matrix/F1_F_CON/iced/40000/F1_F_CON_G2_40000_iced.matrix',
indices_path = '/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/matrix/F1_F_CON/raw/40000/F1_F_CON_G2_40000_abs.bed',
sample_name = "F_CON_PWK"
)

F_CON_TAD_C57 <-  import(
  "/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/06.TAD/02.TAD/F1_F_CON/F1_F_CON_40k_C57_fdr_domains_suboundary.bed"
)

F_CON_TAD_PWK <-  import(
  "/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/06.TAD/02.TAD/F1_F_CON/F1_F_CON_40k_PWK_fdr_domains_suboundary.bed"
)

tads_c57_df <- as.data.frame(F_CON_TAD_C57)[, c("seqnames", "start", "end")]
tads_pwk_df <- as.data.frame(F_CON_TAD_PWK)[, c("seqnames", "start", "end")]

tads_c57_df_chrX <- tads_c57_df[tads_c57_df$seqnames == "chrX", ]
tads_pwk_df_chrX <- tads_pwk_df[tads_pwk_df$seqnames == "chrX", ]

tads_chrX_merged <- unique(
  rbind(
    tads_c57_df[tads_c57_df$seqnames == "chrX", ],
    tads_pwk_df[tads_pwk_df$seqnames == "chrX", ]
  )
)



F_CON_C57calls <- ATA(list("F_CON_C57" = F_CON_C57,
                      'F_CON_PWK' = F_CON_PWK),
                      bed = tads_chrX_merged)


    
    # pdf(
    #   file.path("/public/home/mjy/HCC/F1/HiC/06.TAD/03.GENOVA/chrX:80-100M/F1_F_CON_chrX_ATA_diff.pdf"),
    #   width = 6,
    #   height = 6
    # )
    # 

  visualise(F_CON_C57calls,
            colour_lim = c(0,500),
            colour_lim_contrast = c(-15,15),
            metric = "diff",
            focus = 1) # which entry to use as comparison
    
    # dev.off()


```
